context: Tests whether the agent correctly extends WC_Shipping_Method to create a custom shipping class, registers it via the appropriate filter, supports shipping zones and instance settings, and builds a REST API endpoint with proper permission handling and HPOS-compatible order queries.

checklist.name: Extends WC_Shipping_Method
checklist.description: Custom shipping class extends \WC_Shipping_Method (not implementing from scratch or extending a different base class)

checklist.name: Registered via filter
checklist.description: Custom shipping method class is registered using the 'woocommerce_shipping_methods' filter that returns the modified $methods array with the class name as the value

checklist.name: instance_form_fields used
checklist.description: Shipping configuration fields are defined in $this->instance_form_fields inside init_form_fields()

checklist.name: add_rate() in calculate_shipping
checklist.description: The calculate_shipping() method calls $this->add_rate() to add a rate with at least 'id', 'label', and 'cost' keys

checklist.name: REST endpoint via rest_api_init
checklist.description: REST routes are registered inside a callback hooked to the 'rest_api_init' action

checklist.name: register_rest_route used
checklist.description: REST routes are registered using register_rest_route() with a versioned namespace (e.g., 'myplugin/v1')

checklist.name: Admin permission callback
checklist.description: Protected REST endpoint uses current_user_can('manage_woocommerce') in its permission_callback (not hardcoded true or '__return_true' for admin endpoints)

checklist.name: HPOS-compatible order query
checklist.description: Order queries use wc_get_orders() rather than new WP_Query() or $wpdb direct queries

checklist.name: validate_callback on args
checklist.description: REST route args include at least one parameter with a 'validate_callback' key
